season.id: Unction | Baptism | Crowning | MonkOrdination | NunConsecration | StGregoryLiturgy

Title.language: The Prayer after “Our Father” Addressed to the Father
The Prayer after “Our Father” Addressed to the Father

text.language: Ce ten]ho e~rok Vnou] Viwt pipantokratwr: m~perenten e~qoun e~piracmoc: alla nahmen e~bolha pipethwou.
Yes, we ask You, O God, the Father, the Pantocrator, lead us not into temptation, but deliver us from the evil one.
Yes, we ask You, O God, the Father, the Pantocrator, lead us not into temptation, but deliver us from the evil one.
نَعَمْ نسأَلُكَ يا اللهُ الآبُ ضابطَ الكلِّ، لا تُدخِلْنَا في تجربةٍ لكن نجِّنا من الشريرِ
Nie~nergia men etoi n~ouyo n~r/] n~te p~catanac: hitou e~bol haron.
Take away from us the manifold works of Satan,
Take away from us the manifold works of Satan,
فالأفعالُ المتنوعةُ التي لِلشيطانِ، اطرحْها عنا.
Nie~piboul/ de etsop qen p~co[ni n~te hanrwmi euhwou: a~ritou t/rou n~aprakton.
and the intrigues that are from the counsel of wicked men; bring them all to no avail,
and the intrigues that are from the counsel of wicked men; bring them all to no avail,
والسعاياتُ الكائنةُ بمشورةِ الناسِ الأشرارِ، اجعلْها كلَّها كلا شيءٍ.
Aricobt e~ron n~c/ou niben qen tekoui~nam n~reftanqo.
and fortify us at all times by Your life-giving right hand,
and fortify us at all times by Your life-giving right hand,
حَصِّـنَّا كلَّ حينٍ بيمينِكَ المحييَةِ.
Je n~yok pe penbo/~yoc ouoh pennas]: qen Pi,~rictoc I/couc Pen[oic.
for You are our helper and protector in Christ Jesus our Lord.
for You are our helper and protector in Christ Jesus our Lord.
لأنَكَ أنتَ هو معينُنا وناصِرُنا، بالمسيحِ يسوعَ ربِّنا.

Title.language: Alternate Prayer after “Our Father” Addressed to the Father
Alternate Prayer after “Our Father” Addressed to the Father

comment.language: The priest may say this alternate prayer.
The priest may say this alternate prayer.

text.language: Ce ten]ho e~rok P[oic Pennou]: m~peren h~li n~q/ten e~qoun e~piracmoc: vai e~te m~mons~jom m~mon e~fai qarof eybe tenmetacyen/c.
Yes, we ask You, O Lord our God, lead none of us into temptation—this which we cannot endure on account of our weakness—
Yes, we ask You, O Lord our God, lead none of us into temptation—this which we cannot endure on account of our weakness—
نَعَمْ نسأَلُكَ أيها الربُّ إلـهُنا، لا تُدْخِلْ أحداً منا في تجربةٍ. هذه التي لا نستطيع أن نحتمِلَها من أجلِ ضعفِنا.
Alla nem pikepiracmoc moi nan m~penjini~ e~boln~q/tf: hina n~tens~jemjom e~w~sem n~nicoynef t/rou et[er/out n~,~rwm n~te pidiaboloc.
but grant us also to walk out of the temptation that we may be able to quench all the fiery, blazing darts of the Devil.
but grant us also to walk out of the temptation that we may be able to quench all the fiery, blazing darts of the Devil.
بل ومع التجربةِ أيضاً إعطِنا مخرجنا منها، لكي نستطيعَ أن نُطفِئََ جميعَ سهامِ إبليسَ المتقدةِ ناراً.
Ouoh nahmen e~bolha pipethwou nem nefh~b/oui~: qen Pi,~rictoc I/couc Pen[oic.
And deliver us from the evil one and his deeds in Christ Jesus our Lord.
And deliver us from the evil one and his deeds in Christ Jesus our Lord.
ونجنا من الشريرِ وأعمالِهِ، بالمسيحِ يسوعَ ربِّنا.
Enwpion cou Kurie.
Before You, O Lord.
Di hadapan-Mu ya Tuhan.
أمامك يارب

comment.language: The people bow their heads until the conclusion of the following two prayers.
The people bow their heads until the conclusion of the following two prayers.
ويطامنون رؤوسهم إلى آخر قراءة الصلاتين الآتيتين:

season.id: Unction | Baptism | Crowning | MonkOrdination | NunConsecration | StGregoryLiturgy

text.language: Proc,wmen Yeou metavobou: a~m/n.
Let us attend in the fear of God. Amen.
Marilah kita hadir dalam taku akan Allah. Amin.
ننصت بخوف الله. آمين

comment.language: The priest turns his face towards the west and signs the congregation with the cross in his hand and says:
The priest turns his face towards the west and signs the congregation with the cross in his hand and says:
يتجه الكاهن إلى الغرب ويرشم الشعب بالصليب الذي بيده ويقول:

text.language: Ir/n/ paci.
Peace be with all.
Salam damai bagi semua. (Irini Pasi)
السلام للكل

comment.language: The priest says inaudibly the short prayers for the peace of the church and for the fathers.
The priest says inaudibly the short prayers for the peace of the church and for the fathers.
ثم يقول الكاهن أوشيتي السلام والآباء الصغيرتين سراً.

text.language: Ariv~meui~ P[oic n~nenjinywou] c~mou e~rwou.
Remember, O Lord, our assemblies; bless them.
Ingatlah ya Tuhan jemaat kami, berkatilah mereka.
أذكر يارب اجتماعاتنا باركها

comment.language: The deacon raises the cross, and says:
The deacon raises the cross, and says:
